SEARCH
Package com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item

Class DurableItem

java.lang.Object
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.Item
com.noorlandmc.NoorItems.item.DurableItem
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
Direct Known Subclasses:
Armor, Tool
public abstract class DurableItem extends Item
Abstract base class for custom items with custom durabilities.

Provides common properties and methods for all custom items, such as ID, name, material, durability, and stack size.

Handles giving, item retrieval, and item identification, allowing subclasses to define specific behaviors and attributes.

  • Field Details

    • durability

      protected final int durability
      The durability of this item. This durability is managed separately from the item's vanilla durability, allowing for custom behavior and attributes related to durability.

  • Method Details

    • onDamage

      public void onDamage(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerItemDamageEvent event)
      Handler for custom durability. This decrements the custom durability by the expected amount and normalizes it to the vanilla items durability range.
      Parameters:
      event - The PlayerItemDamageEvent that triggers.

    • damageItem

      public void damageItem(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack item, int amount)
      Manually damage an item by a set amount by running a PlayerItemDamageEvent.
      Parameters:
      player - The player holding the item.
      item - The item taking the damage.
      amount - The amount of damage the item should take.
